differential_diagnoses: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKP) syndrome with metastatic infection
Staphylococcus aureus sepsis with metastatic seeding (endophthalmitis and hepatic abscess)
next_steps: Perform diagnostic vitrectomy and aqueous humor aspiration for culture and PCR
Repeat blood cultures (aerobic and anaerobic) and obtain liver abscess aspirate for microbiology
Consult Ophthalmology for urgent management of endophthalmitis
Consult Infectious Disease for targeted antimicrobial therapy escalation
Consult Interventional Radiology for drainage of the hepatic abscess
